title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.340 - Betty L. Thompson Day designated for December 3
text:
9.340.  Betty L. Thompson Day designated for December 3. — December third each year is hereby designated as "Betty L. Thompson Day" in Missouri.  Citizens of this state are encouraged to engage in appropriate events and activities to honor the life and work of Betty Thompson's contributions to the state of Missouri.
(L. 2022 H.B. 2627)
